name: The Rapture Takes the Loudest First
text:
The loudest player at the table right now (settle disputes by getting louder) exiles all creatures they control face up. They are raptured; congratulations. You gain 2 life for each.
Then, if you were the loudest, that's you — exile your own board too and feel very holy about it. Put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock for each creature exiled this way.
The quietest player gains control of one exiled creature of their choice and is asked to keep it down.
flavorText: Volume, it turns out, was the sin all along.
